CreatePfs.name: Instance name. • Length: 1–128 English or Chinese characters. • Must start with an uppercase/lowercase letter or Chinese character. • Can contain digits, Chinese characters, colons (:), underscores (_), or hyphens (-).
CreatePfs.instanceType: Optional types include: base, basic, baseX, plus, plus2, plusl2X, plusl3_p1
CreatePfs.capacity: Storage capacity to purchase for the file system in GB; not required for plusl3_p1 type (elastic scaling, no minimum), required for all other types.
CreatePfs.zone: Availability zone for plusl3_p1 type; required for plusl3_p1, not required for other types.
CreatePfs.subnetId: Short subnet ID; not required for plusl3_p1 type, required for all other types.
CreatePfs.tags.tagKey: Tag key. Can contain uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters -_ /. Length: 1–65.
CreatePfs.tags.tagValue: Tag value. Can contain uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters -_ /. Length: 0–65.
